query: Design the architecture for this new order platform from quality requirements.
Compare a modular monolith and microservices for these constraints.
Choose service and data ownership boundaries for this domain.
Evaluate event-driven and synchronous alternatives with trade-offs.
Turn these quality attributes into measurable architecture scenarios.
Review whether this proposed architecture satisfies recovery and deployment goals.
Design an evolutionary path from the current system to the target architecture.
Model consistency, failure, and replay semantics for this event architecture.
Select an architecture pattern only after comparing a simpler baseline.
Validate the riskiest assumptions in this distributed design.
Document the existing codebase architecture.
Create an ADR for a decision we already made.
Design a normalized PostgreSQL schema.
Refactor this class into smaller methods.
Draw the supplied architecture as a diagram.
Implement this REST endpoint.
Explain the observer pattern.
Plan a database column migration.
Review this code for vulnerabilities.
Write a README for this project.
